signals.npcLine: Crypto shadows deepen; markets bleed under cold neon skies.
signals.questPulse: Scan for token anomalies amid growing net tension.
signals.worldFeed: Digital credits falter, global ledger wanes in trust.
signals.clueEvent: Unstable circuits detected in major trade hubs.

signals.npcLine: Signal shows five tokens pulsing, but danger masks profits.

signals.clueEvent: Underground whispers targeting rising but unstable assets.

signals.npcLine: Fear index climbing—night market eyes twitch at shadow trades.
signals.questPulse: Hunt down cause behind dropping digital asset confidence.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment dips; fear contaminates netvoices and backchannels.

signals.npcLine: Data miners needed: sift through noise to find safe grounds.

signals.npcLine: Streetwise dealer warns: 'Tokens flare bright, then burn.'
